title: taraxacum glaucinum
intro: Taraxacum glaucinum, also known as the blue dandelion or silver dandelion, is a perennial plant species belonging to the dandelion family, Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to act as a diuretic and to support liver function. The health benefits of Taraxacum glaucinum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol, and is used in herbal remedies for its various medicinal properties.
